title: Deptt of Food and PD, Sugarcane Control Amendment Order 1976
description: Deptt of Food and PD, Sugarcane Control Amendment Order 1976

Com./Sugarcane.-In: exercise of the powers conferred by Section 3 of the Essential Commodities Act. 1955 (10 of 1955), the Central Gov- ernment hereby makes the follow1ng Order further to amend the Sugarcane (Control) Order, 1966, namely:- 1. (1) This Order may be called the Sugarcane (Control) Amendment Order, 1976. (2) It shall come into force at once. 2. In the Sugarcane (Control) Order 1966, in sub-clause (1) of clause 9A, for the words 'any person' the following words shall be substituted, namely:- "any officer not lower than the rank of a Police Inspector or Tahsildar or an officer of an equivalent rank." [No. 15-6/75..sPY.J S. V. SAMPATH, Jt.
